segments.original_text: ジャンプしたところに空中前

segments.text: Come on, place the bomb, place the bomb!
segments.original_text: さあボムを置いて置いて

segments.text: Placed the bomb and got hit!
segments.original_text: ボムを置いてそして被弾した

full_text: Fair right as he jumped! Come on, place the bomb, place the bomb! Placed the bomb and got hit!
